response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior/mid role. While technical skills (TypeScript, Node.js, React-adjacent work, AWS, Kubernetes) exceed requirements, this is a severe seniority mismatch — overqualified candidates typically disengage quickly, expect compensation misaligned with the band, and the role explicitly targets someone taking 'progressively more responsibility'. Additionally, candidate is based in Bucharest while the role requires high on-site presence (likely Germany based on language hints), and there is no PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience listed (MongoDB instead).
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js fullstack experience across multiple production platforms
AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD expertise exceeds nice-to-haves
Strong software craftsmanship culture (TDD, pairing, trunk-based dev) and AI/LLM tooling exposure
concerns: Severe overqualification — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level position
Location mismatch (Bucharest) vs high on-site presence requirement; only basic German
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience; database background is MongoDB
